Klasse JumpingPhase

java.lang.Object
phases.GamePhase
phases.JumpingPhase
public class JumpingPhase extends GamePhase
This class represents the jumping phase of the game where players can jump to unoccupied nodes. It extends the GamePhase class and implements the handleMove method to allow jumping moves.

  • Feldübersicht

    Von Klasse geerbte Felder phases.GamePhase

    playerEntity

  • Konstruktorübersicht

    Konstruktoren
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
    JumpingPhase(PlayerEntity playerEntity)
    Sets the context.

  • Methodenübersicht

    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    boolean
    handleMove(Node fromNode, Node toNode)
    In this state the player can jump to unoccupied nodes, if the target Node is not already occupied.
    void
    nextPhase()
    Checks if the condition to change the phase is met (2 stones remaining).

    Von Klasse geerbte Methoden java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Konstruktordetails

    • JumpingPhase

      public JumpingPhase(PlayerEntity playerEntity)
      Sets the context.
      Parameter:
      playerEntity - Context that uses the phase.

  • Methodendetails

    • handleMove

      public boolean handleMove(Node fromNode, Node toNode)
      In this state the player can jump to unoccupied nodes, if the target Node is not already occupied.
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      handleMove in Klasse GamePhase
      Parameter:
      fromNode - The origin node (not used here).
      toNode - The target node.
      Gibt zurück:
      true if the move was successful, false otherwise.

    • nextPhase

      public void nextPhase()
      Checks if the condition to change the phase is met (2 stones remaining). Changes to the GameOverPhase if so.
      Setzt außer Kraft:
      nextPhase in Klasse GamePhase
